entries.section: Leveling Rotation for Enhancement Shaman DPS in Burning Crusade
entries.text: If you will be standing in the same area for a minute, Searing Totem is a cheap way to get a good amount of extra damage in.

entries.section: Leveling Rotation for Enhancement Shaman DPS in Burning Crusade
entries.text: Keep Flame Shock applied to your target.

entries.section: Leveling Rotation for Enhancement Shaman DPS in Burning Crusade
entries.text: Use Stormstrike on cooldown (or time it to hit just as Windfury Weapon internal cooldown expires for maximum benefit, but this can also be a DPS loss if you wait too long and lose potential Stormstrike usages).

entries.section: Leveling Rotation for Enhancement Shaman DPS in Burning Crusade
entries.text: Use Earth Shock when Flame Shock is already active.

entries.section: Leveling Rotation for Enhancement Shaman DPS in Burning Crusade
entries.text: Use Fire Nova Totem on cooldown but make sure all mobs have been hit by something else first, or they will kill it instantly.

entries.section: Leveling Rotation for Enhancement Shaman DPS in Burning Crusade
entries.text: Maintain Magma Totem while Fire Nova is recharging.

entries.section: Leveling Rotation for Enhancement Shaman DPS in Burning Crusade
entries.text: Follow your single-target rotation while not placing Fire Totems.

sections.heading: Leveling Rotation for Enhancement Shaman DPS in Burning Crusade

entries.section: Leveling Tips for Enhancement Shaman DPS in TBC Classic
entries.text: Stoneclaw Totem is your best friend when dealing with multiple enemies at once. In TBC, it has the new power of stunning enemies who attack it very often, making it much better at actually distracting enemies long enough for you to kill them one by one without breaking a sweat. Do not sleep on this totem—try it out on those tough multi-mob pulls.

entries.section: Leveling Tips for Enhancement Shaman DPS in TBC Classic
entries.text: Make sure to train Ghost Wolf as soon as you hit Level 20, as it will make your leveling much faster until you can get a proper mount at Level 30. Windfury Weapon is also a major spell, which you can train as soon as you hit Level 30. Get it along with your mount for maximum efficiency.

entries.section: Leveling Tips for Enhancement Shaman DPS in TBC Classic
entries.text: Try to group your spell casts together. The "5 second" rule determines that your Mana can only naturally regenerate when you have not cast anything for 5 seconds, which means that you can get a significant amount of Mana back from remembering to refresh Lightning Shield , using your spells, and healing yourself in consecutive global cooldowns, rather than spacing these casts out.

entries.section: Leveling Tips for Enhancement Shaman DPS in TBC Classic
entries.text: No matter what you are doing, whenever you are full Mana, stop and kill 1-2 enemies before continuing on your journey. This will give you a lot of extra experience in the long run and allow you to always be using your natural mana regeneration.

entries.section: Leveling Tips for Enhancement Shaman DPS in TBC Classic
entries.text: While they do not give any end-game power, gathering professions such as Herbalism and Skinning are great while leveling, as you can level them up as you move from zone to zone and get some free gold by selling the gathered materials!

sections.heading: Leveling Tips for Enhancement Shaman DPS in TBC Classic
